target: from pathlib import Path; import re; raw=Path('AGENTS.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); t=re.sub(r'<!--.*?-->', '', raw, flags=re.S); assert '"Build the factory" = wire **3 connectors**' not in t; assert re.search(r'^## Shipped connector inventory[ \t]*$', t, flags=re.M); assert len(re.findall(r'^## Current verified backlog[ \t]*$', t, flags=re.M)) == 1; assert 'This is the **only** section Dreaming may use to seed an empty GitHub board.' in t; assert 'GREEN now → the entry is stale or shipped; do not create an issue.' in t
